feat: curated company expansion + deterministic stage-fit alignment

- add stageFitForStage() canonical mapping (series_b_plus/growth -> too_late,
  seed/pre_seed/early_series_a/spin_out_forming -> primary, etc.) so late-stage
  companies can never be tagged primary_candidate
- expand-companies.ts: add 15 real, source-backed, in-thesis early-stage
  spin-outs (photonics/quantum/semis/sensors/materials/medtech, NL/DE/SW-US)
  via per-company Exa + Haiku extraction + strict Zod validation (36 live total)
- reconcile-stagefit.ts: deterministic no-API pass fixing stageFit/tier on all
  live companies (corrected 15, incl. mislabelled late-stage rows in the first 21)
- clean-diligence.ts: drop stale-code + out_of_scope company diligence
  (scorecards 21+4, red flags 231+13, all consistent)

fix: scorecard level mapping, remove leaked credential + one-off scripts

- generate-company-scorecards: map 0-100 TRL/BRL scores into the canonical
  1-9 readiness level (prev. wrote raw scores; a band-aid clamped them to a
  flat 9, wrongly showing early-stage companies as fully mature). Regenerated
  the 21 live scorecards -> TRL 3 / BRL 2.
- remove scripts/test-neon-branch.ts (hardcoded pre-rotation Neon credential)
- remove committed DB dump; backup-db.ts now writes to gitignored .local-backups/
- delete superseded one-off scripts (fix-scorecards, fix-enum, fix-institutions,
  enrich-phase-13a); drop 'live' as any casts; derive red-flag log count
- gitignore DB dumps

feat: curated company expansion + deterministic stage-fit alignment

- add stageFitForStage() canonical mapping (series_b_plus/growth -> too_late,

- expand-companies.ts: add 15 real, source-backed, in-thesis early-stage

  via per-company Exa + Haiku extraction + strict Zod validation (36 live total)
- reconcile-stagefit.ts: deterministic no-API pass fixing stageFit/tier on all
  live companies (corrected 15, incl. mislabelled late-stage rows in the first 21)
- clean-diligence.ts: drop stale-code + out_of_scope company diligence
  (scorecards 21+4, red flags 231+13, all consistent)
fix: enforce uniqueness on company-centered red flags

Rowing P2: impulse-and-glide boat, both steering profiles — Gate 2 raised

The boat rows. Each detected stroke banks a surge budget applied with a
~0.3 s attack (the visible per-pull lunge); rowing water drag is
PROPORTIONAL to speed (tau ~5.5 s) so each cadence settles at its own
speed and stillness is an exponential drift, never a hard stop — the
prompt's constant decay saturated every cadence at max speed and made
the speed<->rate claim unmeasurable (DECISIONS). Keyboard boat feel
byte-identical: all rowing branches inert without the rowing source.

New: RowingControls (standalone — the Gate-2-frozen flight controller
is untouched): stroke->impulse queue, ROW_PROFILES as data (row-lean,
row-asym: harder left pull turns right; default picked at the live
gate), assist ladder (Full Assist = soft Waterway course-follow),
cruise (6 steady strokes arm; resting holds momentum), autopilot on
loss (drift straight + slow, slew-bounded re-entry), keyboard priority.
Waterway seam: procedural open-water course walked f

@bodyarcade/body-input P3: fixture evals ALL GREEN, package complete

Fixture eval suite (tools/fixture-eval.mjs) asserts per-clip signal
structure on all six flight fixtures — signed lean windows with returns
to dead zone, sustained crouch with release, T-pose -> recenter, seated
flag stable, still-clip zero events + shaped noise floor — into
eval/bodyinput-results.json. Latency pose-frame -> signal p50 10-12 ms.

Real footage forced three extraction fixes: seated classification
rebuilt on leg-fold + ankle-forward cues (deep crouch misread as seated;
MediaPipe z compression flickers thigh angle); mid-motion fallback
neutrals now replaced by the first stillness dwell (a sit-down capture
pegged leanX); armLength floor 1.5 -> 1.1 shoulder-widths (real straight
arm is ~1.3 sw — the floor inflated armLength and capped armsOut at 0.8).
leanY cross-bleed and arms_tpose action events are recorded metrics with
README-documented limitations, not assertions.

Example cross-page consumer (examples/consumer.html) + spec
